title: Settings
subtitle: Manage API access, interface preferences, default folders, and assistant behavior.
clawEnabledDesc: When enabled, the Feishu / Lark phone bridge and local IM webhook can run in the background. Turning it off does not affect normal GUI chats.
clawDefaultWorkspaceDesc: Leave this empty to use the GUI default working directory. Individual phone connections can still override it.
clawManageAgentsEmpty: No phone agent has been connected yet. Use Connect phone to bind Feishu / Lark first.
clawManageAgentNamePlaceholder: Name shown in the IM sidebar
clawManageAgentDescriptionPlaceholder: Example: Handles project questions in the team chat
clawManageAgentIdentityPlaceholder: Define who this agent is, its role, scope, and boundaries.
clawManageAgentPersonalityPlaceholder: Define tone, style, patience, and when it should ask follow-up questions.
clawManageAgentUserContextPlaceholder: Long-lived user, team, or workflow context this phone agent should remember.
clawManageAgentReplyRulesPlaceholder: Define reply format, length, risk checks, or confirmation rules.
clawSkillAllowlistDesc: One skill name per line. Phone connections and scheduled tasks use these skill hints first.
clawExtraSkillDirsDesc: Optional local skill folders to make available to the AI assistant.
clawPromptPrefixDesc: Added before phone messages and scheduled task prompts.
clawPromptPrefixPlaceholder: Example: You are my personal automation assistant. Identify the source before answering.
codePromptPrefixDesc: These instructions are injected before every Code mode conversation. Use for global rules, coding conventions, or persistent preferences.
codePromptPrefixPlaceholder: Example: Always write unit tests for new code. Prefer functional components over class components. Use TypeScript strict mode conventions.
clawRunModeDesc: Default handling mode for phone messages and scheduled tasks.
clawModelDesc: Choose automatic, Pro, or Flash model routing.
clawWorkspaceOverrideDesc: Leave empty to use the default working directory.
clawTasksDesc: Each task sends its prompt to the AI assistant on the configured schedule.
clawTaskPromptPlaceholder: Example: Summarize recent workspace changes and list follow-ups.
themeDesc: Light, dark, or match the operating system.
onboardingPreviewDesc: Reopen the basic setup flow shown on first launch.
fontScaleDesc: Adjust the overall UI text size.
turnCompleteNotificationDesc: Show a native Windows/macOS notification when the AI assistant finishes replying.
desktopOpenAtLoginDesc: Start Sino Code automatically after you sign in.
desktopOpenAtLoginUnsupportedDesc: Open at login is available on Windows and macOS.
desktopStartMinimizedDesc: Keep the main window hidden during Windows login startup.
desktopStartMinimizedDisabledDesc: Enable Open at login first. This option applies to Windows startup.
desktopCloseToTrayDesc: Hide the window to the system tray when it is closed.
shortcutCaptureHint: Press the new shortcut. Press Esc to cancel.
shortcutTogglePlanModeDesc: Switch the composer between Agent and Plan mode.
shortcutNewChatDesc: Start a new chat in the current workspace.
shortcutSelectAllDesc: Select content in the focused view.
shortcutToggleMaximizeDesc: Maximize or restore the main window.
dragonProviderDesc: Select an AI provider and configure its API key and service URL. The selected provider is used by default for chats, writing, and phone connections.
modelProviderModels: Models, one model ID per line
dragonApiKeyDesc: Optional. Leave empty to use the selected provider API key. Fill this only when chat/code assistance needs a different key.
dragonApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use selected provider
dragonApiKeyInherited: Currently using the selected provider API key.
dragonApiKeyMissing: No API key is configured for the selected provider yet.
dragonApiKeyOverride: Currently using an assistant-only API key.
dragonBaseUrlDesc: Optional. Leave empty to use the selected provider service URL. Fill this only when chat/code assistance should connect to a different service.
dragonBaseUrlPlaceholder: Leave empty to use selected provider service URL
dragonBaseUrlInherited: Currently using the selected provider service URL: {{value}}
dragonBaseUrlOverride: Currently using an assistant-only service URL: {{value}}
dragonAssistantAdvancedDesc: Model, assistant-only API, local port, and data path settings for advanced users.
dragonDiagnosticsAdvancedDesc: Runtime abilities, tool connections, and memory records.
dragonRuntimeCapabilitiesDesc: Check whether the local AI assistant service currently has web, skills, attachments, and memory available.
dragonToolDiagnosticsDesc: Check connected tool sources, external tool services, skills, attachments, and memory.
dragonMemoryRecordsDesc: Review memories available to this workspace, then disable or delete anything you do not want reused.
dragonMemoryEmpty: No memory records are visible for this workspace.
dragonBinaryDesc: Usually leave this empty so the app uses the bundled assistant service. Set a path only for local development or debugging.
dragonDataDirDesc: Stores sessions, cache data, and the configuration synced from the app to the assistant service.
dragonModelDesc: Model ID used by the AI assistant. Configure it in the selected provider's model list.
dragonTokenEconomyDesc: Reduce model context use by compacting safe tool descriptions and tool results without changing stored chat history.
dragonTokenEconomySavingsEmpty: Savings will start accumulating after the next request.
dragonTokenEconomyAdvancedDesc: Control exactly what gets compacted, long-history guards, and the local access token.
dragonTokenEconomyOptionsDesc: When context reduction is on, choose which request content is compacted before it reaches the model.
dragonHistoryHygieneDesc: Before each model request, cap long tool results and tool arguments. Original chat history is kept unchanged.
dragonInsecure: Allow local access without a token
dragonInsecureDesc: For local development only. Other local programs can connect to the assistant service without an access token.
dragonInsecureForcedDesc: Local access protection is off because no access token is set. Add a token to control this switch again.
dragonAdvancedDetails: Storage, model context, and tool guards
dragonAdvancedDetailsDesc: These options affect how the assistant runs internally. Per-model context policy comes from models.profiles; this page mainly adjusts fallback behavior.
dragonStorageBackendDesc: Hybrid storage uses SQLite to speed up indexes. Pure JSONL does not use SQLite and is simpler for compatibility debugging.
dragonStorageSqlitePathDesc: Optional. Leave empty to create the index under the assistant data folder. Used only with hybrid storage.
dragonModelContextProfileDesc: Model windows and per-model compaction thresholds come from the selected provider model details. Unknown models use the fallback thresholds below.
dragonModelContextSourceFallback: No matched model profile; using fallback thresholds below
dragonCompactionThresholdsDesc: These values are used only when the current model does not have max context in the selected provider model details.
dragonCompactionSummaryDesc: Local summaries are fast and free. Model summaries read more naturally but use an extra model request.
dragonToolStormDesc: When the model repeats the exact same tool call in one turn, suppress the duplicate and ask it to change approach.
dragonToolStormLimitsDesc: A larger window watches more recent tool calls. A lower threshold suppresses repeated calls sooner.
dragonToolArgumentRepairDesc: Single string arguments longer than this byte count are truncated before tool execution, avoiding unusually large arguments.
portDesc: Port used by the local AI assistant service. Most users do not need to change it.
runtimeTokenDesc: Protects the assistant service running on this computer. Fill this only if another local program needs to connect to it.
configFilePathDesc: Path to the MCP external tool server JSON config.
skillsLocationDesc: Choose the folder Plugins > Skills reads from and saves to by default.
skillsPathDesc: This page only manages folder locations. Use Plugins > Skills to create or edit skills.
skillsScanDirsDesc: One local path per line. Phone connections and scheduled tasks can also use skills from these folders.
skillsActionsDesc: Create, install, and edit skills from Plugins > Skills. Settings keeps only folder-level options.
skillsRootUnavailable: This folder is unavailable. Choose a workspace-backed option or switch to a global skills folder.
mcpSearchEnabledDesc: When many external tools are connected, give the model only the most relevant tools to reduce pauses and context use.
mcpAdvancedDesc: Selection mode, candidate counts, connection config file, and save actions.
mcpSearchModeDesc: Auto filters when many tools are connected; Always filter searches for relevant tools every time; Direct gives every tool to the model.
mcpSearchLimitsDesc: Control how many tools trigger filtering and how many candidate tools are offered each time.
mcpSearchAutoThreshold: Start filtering after this many tools
mcpSearchDiagnosticsDesc: See whether external tool filtering is active and how many tools are available.
mcpPathDesc: Location of the external tool connection config file.
mcpEditorDesc: Edit MCP external tool server connections here. Model, API key, and service URL do not live in this file; they are managed by Basics and model config.
mcpFileStatusReady: The current content was loaded from the config file.
mcpFileStatusMissing: The config file does not exist yet. It will be created on first save.
mcpRuntimeHint: If saved changes do not take effect, restart the local assistant service or reopen the app.
apiKeyDesc: Required. Configure this in the selected provider for chats, writing, and phone connections.
apiKeySharedDesc: Required. Configure this in the selected provider for chats, writing, and phone connections.
baseUrlDesc: Model service endpoint. Configure it on the corresponding provider.
baseUrlSharedDesc: Model service endpoint. Configure it on the corresponding provider.
firstRunTitle: Set up the essentials before you start chatting.
firstRunSubtitle: Choose your interface style and AI provider, then enter your API key to get started.
firstRunChangeLater: You can change these values anytime from Settings after the workbench opens.
firstRunPreviewHint: This reuses the first-launch flow; unsaved theme previews are restored when you close it.
firstRunBuyApiHint: Don't have an API key yet? Visit {{provider}} to buy API access, then come back here to paste it in.
firstRunApiKeyValidation: Please enter an API key before continuing.
firstRunBaseUrlValidation: A Base URL is required when using a custom provider.
firstRunStepProviderDesc: Select the AI provider you already have an API key for.
firstRunStepCredentialsDesc: Enter your {{provider}} API key. The Base URL has been filled in automatically.
firstRunStepCredentialsDescCustom: Enter the API key and Base URL for your custom OpenAI-compatible service.
autoStartDesc: Recommended. The app starts the local assistant service automatically when chats, writing, or phone connections need it.
corsOriginsDesc: Additional allowed Origin values for the local HTTP server.
approvalPolicyDesc: Controls whether the AI assistant must ask before editing files, running commands, or using other tools. Changes apply after the assistant service restarts or reconnects.
approvalSuggest: Suggest only; do not change files
sandboxModeDesc: Limit which local files the AI assistant can read or change. Changes apply after the assistant service restarts or reconnects.
workspaceRootDesc: First launch uses ~/.sinocode/default_workspace by default, and you can change it to another directory.
writeWorkspaceRootDesc: Writing mode reads Markdown documents from here by default. A welcome.md file is created on first launch.
writeInlineCompletionEnabledDesc: Show gray continuation suggestions in the Markdown editor that you can accept with Tab.
writeInlineCompletionRetrievalDesc: Before generating a suggestion, quickly reference Markdown files in the writing workspace so terminology, facts, and style stay consistent.
writeInlineCompletionBaseUrlDesc: Leave empty to use the selected provider service URL. Fill this only if writing should connect to a different service.
writeInlineCompletionBaseUrlInherited: Currently using the selected provider service URL: {{value}}
writeInlineCompletionBaseUrlOverride: Currently using a writing-specific service URL: {{value}}
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyDesc: Optional. Leave empty to use the selected provider API key; fill this only when Write should use a different key.
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use selected provider
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyInherited: Currently using the selected provider API key.
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyMissing: No API key is configured for the selected provider yet.
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyOverride: Currently using a writing-only API key.
writeInlineCompletionModelDesc: Leave this empty to use the assistant model. Fill it only if writing suggestions need their own model.
writeInlineCompletionModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to use assistant model
writeInlineCompletionDebounceDesc: How long the editor waits after typing stops before showing a suggestion. Shorter is more responsive; longer is quieter and saves requests.
writeInlineCompletionThresholdDesc: Controls how often suggestions appear. Stricter settings show fewer, steadier suggestions.
writeInlineCompletionMaxTokensDesc: Higher numbers allow longer suggestions. Keep this short so suggestions feel like the next few lines, not a full draft.
writeInlineLongCompletionDesc: When the cursor rests longer at a line end or paragraph boundary, show a fuller next sentence or paragraph idea.
writeInlineLongCompletionMaxTokensDesc: Controls the maximum length for paragraph inspiration suggestions, best for about one paragraph of continuation.
writeInlineCompletionApiNote: These settings only affect automatic suggestions in Writing mode. Empty values use the selected provider API key, service URL, and assistant model. Press Tab to accept and Esc to hide.
writeDebugLogDesc: View recent writing suggestion requests and responses to understand why suggestions did not appear or felt off.
writeDebugLogModalDesc: Inspect the context sent for writing suggestions, raw model responses, and parsed output.
writeInlineEditDebugDesc: Inspect recent writing edit calls, including what was sent to the model, the raw response, and the parsed action, so it is easier to tell whether a problem came from the request, model output, or app handling.
writeInlineEditDebugEmpty: No text edit calls yet. Run AI Edit on a selection and the calls will appear here.
writeCompletionDebugEmpty: No writing suggestion calls yet. Trigger a writing suggestion and the calls will appear here.
writeApiKeyDesc: Writing completion and the writing assistant use the selected provider API key unless a Write override is set.
apiKeyRequiredBody: Add your API key in Basics first. Once entered, the app can start the local AI assistant service for you.
guiUpdateChannelDesc: Stable is the default; Frontier is only used after you switch to it. Stable only receives formal stable releases.
guiUpdateDesc: Check the selected release channel for GUI updates, then download and install in the app.
guiUpdateCheckFailed: Could not check for GUI updates
guiUpdateErrNotConfigured: Update checking isn't available right now.
guiUpdateErrUnsupported: This build does not support in-app automatic updates. Open the download page to install manually.
guiUpdateErrRepoNotFound: The update source «{{repo}}» wasn't found or isn't reachable on GitHub.
guiUpdateErrForbidden: Couldn't fetch update information. Try again later.
guiUpdateErrRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again later.
guiUpdateErrNoStableVersion: No stable release or tag to compare yet (for example v0.1.0). Repo: {{repo}}.
guiUpdateAvailableManual: New version available: {{current}} → {{latest}}. Install it from the download page.
guiUpdateDownloadedDesc: Restart the app to install the new version.
logDirDesc: App error logs and local assistant service output are written to daily files in this folder.
logEnabledDesc: Write tool call errors, request failures, app errors, and local assistant service output to log files. Logs are cleaned up automatically.
logRetentionDesc: Delete log files older than the selected number of days.
preloadBridgeError: The app bridge is not available. Restart the application or check the preload path.
